title: Turkish-Style Yogurt Stir-Fry
description: A quick and easy Turkish-inspired stir-fry using yogurt as a base. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.amount: 1 cup mixed vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, and onions)

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, flour, paprika, and salt.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Optional: Garnish with additional paprika and a dollop of yogurt, if desired.
